extraction_notes: Scanned all 128 issues. 16 issues contain explicit PostHog tracking plans or PostHog event references. Events from formal 'PostHog Tracking Plan' sections are marked chat_prd; events mentioned in 'How to Measure Success' sections are marked manual.

funnels.name: Candidate Job Application Funnel
funnels.success_target: Drop-off at each step indicates where friction exists

funnels.name: Job Detail Apply Conversion
funnels.success_target: Apply conversion rate >= 20% for Easy Apply-enabled jobs

funnels.name: Save-to-Apply Conversion
funnels.success_target: >= 30% of saved jobs result in application within 7 days

funnels.name: Org Job Creation Flow
funnels.success_target: Draft-to-publish rate measures form complexity; self-service rate should trend toward 100%

funnels.name: Org Dashboard Retention Signal
funnels.success_target: >= 2 visits/month per active org; orgs who visit within 7 days of first job post are more likely to post a second

funnels.name: Profile Completion Nudge Funnel
funnels.success_target: Nudge-to-action rate: % who edit profile within 48 hours; unsubscribe rate < 3%
